mapper.select: SELECT warehouse_id FROM tb_stock WHERE sku_id = #{skuId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_stock (warehouse_id, sku_id, available, locked, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{warehouseId}, #{skuId}, #{available}, #{locked}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_stock WHERE (#{skuId} IS NULL OR sku_id = #{skuId}) AND (#{warehouseId} IS NULL OR warehouse_id = #{warehouseId})

SELECT id, warehouse_id, sku_id, available, locked, version, create_time, update_time FROM tb_stock WHERE (#{skuId} IS NULL OR sku_id = #{skuId}) AND (#{warehouseId} IS NULL OR warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_stock SET available = available + #{delta}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{stockId} AND version = #{version} AND (available + #{delta}) >= 0

UPDATE tb_stock SET available = available + #{deltaAvailable}, locked = locked + #{deltaLocked}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{stockId} AND version = #{version} AND (available + #{deltaAvailable}) >= 0 AND (locked + #{deltaLocked}) >= 0
